scripts.check:m00: uv run --frozen python tools/dev/validate_m00.py && uv run --frozen python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" && node tools/dev/check-node-workspace.mjs
scripts.test:contracts: uv run --frozen python tools/contracts/generate_models.py --check && pnpm --filter @hina/contracts check:generated && uv run --frozen python -m unittest discover -s tests/contracts -p "test_*.py" && pnpm --filter @hina/contracts test
